name: railway
description: War Room pinned Railway MCP access for deployment and infrastructure workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Railway remote MCP access pinned for War Room.
interface.longDescription: Expose Railway's remote MCP server through the War Room plugin marketplace so Codex workflows can inspect and operate Railway resources after OAuth or bearer-token authentication is configured locally.
defaultPrompt: Inspect Railway services, deployments, environment variables, and logs for this project.
